questions: What is the patient's age in years?
Is the patient currently on Hormone Replacement Therapy (HRT)? (Yes/No)
Is there a palpable pelvic mass? (Yes/No)
Are there lesions suspicious of cancer on vulva, vagina, or cervix on examination or ultrasound? (Yes/No)
Is the patient experiencing postcoital bleeding (PCB)? (Yes/No)
If yes to PCB, for how long has it persisted? (in weeks)
Is the patient experiencing prolonged or unexpected bleeding that persists for more than 4 weeks after stopping HRT? (Yes/No)
Is the patient over 45 years with persistent abdominal distension or pain? (Yes/No)
What is the identified cause of the Postmenopausal Bleeding (PMB)? (e.g., Benign neoplasm, HRT, Infection, Injury, Coagulation disorder, Endometritis, Atrophic vaginitis, Cancer, Unexplained)
